notes: Built the first end-to-end slice: commander CLI (`task next`, `task ready`, --json, --from-index), zod task schema + JSON loader, and a bun:sqlite index behind a runtime adapter (node:sqlite fallback). 8 bun:test cases pass, including the real bun:sqlite path and a zod-rejection case. Stack composition (Bun + commander + zod + bun:sqlite + JSON) is proven.
